title: cirsium × treuinfelsianum
intro: Cirsium × treuinfelsianum, also known as the thistle spurge or prickly thistle, is a rare hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its root and flowers, which are rich in essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Cirsium × treuinfelsianum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may aid in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to make salves and creams for topical applications.
